message:
Fix parseIf comprehensive errdefer handling for body allocations

- Track if_body, elif_body, else_body with nullable types and errdefer
- Add errdefer for condition_ptr and elif_condition_ptr allocations
- Fix else_stmts to use errdefer instead of defer with proper item cleanup
- Transfer ownership explicitly by setting pointers to null after append
- Free slice wrappers after transferring items to else_stmts

This eliminates all remaining memory leaks in Flask import (from 21 to 0).
Simple files and blinker imports also maintain 0 leaks.
